incident_summary: Portal authentication service experienced a full outage for approximately 50 minutes due to session-service-prod becoming unreachable, preventing customer logins while core threat detection remained operational

root_cause.summary: session-service-prod backend became unreachable, blocking SSO token validation required for portal authentication
root_cause.mechanism: Portal auth service depends on session-service-prod for SSO token validation; when session service became unreachable at internal endpoint session-service-prod.internal:8080, all authentication requests failed

customer_impact.description: Customers were unable to log into the security portal for approximately 50 minutes. Login attempts failed with authentication errors. Email threat detection and processing continued operating normally throughout the incident.
affected_functionality: Access to portal dashboard and UI
unaffected_functionality: Email threat detection and processing (IES pipeline confirmed stable throughout incident)

resolution.confirmed_by: Logs show 'session-service-prod connection restored' at 10:00 UTC; portal_auth_response_latency_seconds returned to baseline 0.22s at 10:00 UTC (from peak of 14s); engineer confirmed 'portal fully accessible again' at 10:05 UTC

root_cause: CloudWatch logs showing repeated 'session-service-prod unreachable' errors starting 09:10 UTC
CloudWatch health check failure at 09:12 UTC specifying session-service-prod.internal:8080
Slack: engineer stated 'logs show session-service-prod is unreachable, that's the auth backend' at 09:20
Recovery correlation: pod restart at 09:45 followed by connection restoration at 10:00
timeline: Onset 09:10 UTC: First CloudWatch ERROR for SSO token validation failure
Mitigation 09:45 UTC: CloudWatch INFO log 'Restarting session-service-prod pod'
Recovery 10:00 UTC: CloudWatch INFO 'connection restored' + Prometheus latency returned to 0.22s baseline
Resolved 10:05 UTC: PagerDuty resolution + Slack engineer confirmation
customer_impact: Slack 09:14: 'customers can't log in' and 'portal is down'
Prometheus: portal_auth_response_latency_seconds spiked from 0.2s baseline to 9.5s at onset, peaked at 14s
Slack 09:15: 'IES detection is still running - emails are being processed normally'
Prometheus: ies_emails_processed_total remained stable at ~4.5e+03 throughout incident
Slack 10:05: 'Detection was unaffected the entire time - only portal login was impacted'

data_gaps: Root trigger for session-service-prod becoming unreachable is not identified in available data - no deployment, infrastructure event, or resource exhaustion mentioned
Geographic scope unknown - logs reference 'prod-us-east-1' but no confirmation whether other regions were affected or if service is single-region
Number of affected customers or failed login attempts not quantified
Session-service-prod failure mode unclear (crashed, network partition, resource starvation, etc.)
